title: Temp's Delicious Weaponry
description: Turn your food into tasty weapons.
body:
This is NOT a Joke mod

Temp's Delicious Weaponry allows the player to make weapons out of food. You can make a sword out of bread or an axe out of potato. You can make knives from carrot or melon. As the mod develops, these food weapons can be crafted with new ingredients to make stronger food weapons.

A wiki for the mod will be made avaidable in the future, which will give more detailed info on different items and additional trades.

version 1.3.0 is compatable with Better Combat

Epic fight compatability is trickier, but I'll get to it at some point.

The mod will be developed for both 1.19.2 and 1.20.1. in terms of updates, 1.19.2 will be prioritised in receiving new updates. a backport for 1.18.2 will be considered for the future
